select_preferred_language: Select your preferred language to continue
login_desc: Enter your credentials to continue managing your GramUnnati Delivery Partner operations.
application_pending_desc: Your application has been submitted successfully and is currently being reviewed by our team.
enter_mobile: Enter your mobile number to receive an OTP for verification.
invalid_mobile_start: Invalid mobile number. The number should start from 6
select_role: Select your role to get started
gmu_member_desc: Manage your group's orders and tracking
help_desc: If you are facing any issues with the application, please reach out to our support team.
empowering_statement: Empowering women through organized logistics and community support.
terms_desc_1: 1. Acceptance of Terms: By accessing and using this app, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement.
terms_desc_2: 2. User Conduct: You agree to use the app only for lawful purposes and in a way that does not infringe the rights of, restrict or inhibit anyone else's use and enjoyment of the app.
terms_desc_3: 3. Privacy Policy: Your use of the app is also subject to our Privacy Policy. Please review our Privacy Policy, which also governs the app and informs users of our data collection practices.
privacy_desc_1: 1. Information Collection: We collect information to provide better services to all our users. We may collect personal identification information from Users in a variety of ways.
privacy_desc_2: 2. Information Usage: We may use the information we collect from you when you register, make a purchase, or use certain other app features.
privacy_desc_3: 3. Information Protection: We adopt appropriate data collection, storage and processing practices and security measures to protect against unauthorized access.
system_settings_desc: Manage your application preferences and regional settings.
language_preference_desc: Choose your preferred language for the application interface.
profile_updated_desc: Your profile changes have been successfully saved.
route_desc: 3 new efficient paths available for today's fleet
manage_track_orders: Manage and track all your GramUnnati Delivery Partner orders in one place.
feature_in_progress_desc: We're working hard to bring you the best experience. This feature will be available soon!
